title: Customer Insights Methodology
content: Understanding customer insights involves: 1) Collecting feedback through surveys, interviews, and reviews; 2) Analyzing purchase behavior and patterns; 3) Identifying customer pain points and satisfaction drivers; 4) Creating customer personas; 5) Tracking customer journey touchpoints. Key techniques: sentiment analysis of reviews, cohort analysis, and net promoter score (NPS) measurement.
content_zh: 理解客户洞察包括：1) 通过调查、访谈和评论收集反馈；2) 分析购买行为和模式；3) 识别客户痛点和满意度驱动因素；4) 创建客户画像；5) 跟踪客户旅程触点。关键技术：评论情感分析、群组分析和净推荐值(NPS)测量。
